revision.comment: Created page with "{{#invoke:GaiadDate|convert | date = {{{date|}}} | anchor = {{{anchor|12-21}}} | months = {{{months|Capricorn,Aquarius,Pisces,Aries,Taurus,Gemini,Cancer,Leo,Virgo,Libra,Scorpio,Sagittarius,Ophiuchus}}} | weekdays = {{{weekdays|Sun,Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri,Sat}}} | format = {{{format|long}}} }}"

revision.text:
<!-- Template:GaiadDate : 13×28 from ISO week-year; default OFFSET=-28 -->
<!-- Usage:
     {{GaiadDate}}                       → today (long)
     {{GaiadDate|date=2025-08-18}}       → Leo 8, 12025 (with default offset)
     {{GaiadDate|date=2025-08-18|format=parts}} → MONTH|DAY|YEAR|DOY|MONTHIDX
     Optional: |offset=-28 (default), |year_offset=10000, |format=long|short|parts
-->
{{#switch: {{{format|long}}}
 | parts =
   {{#switch:
     1
     |1={{#vardefine:DATE|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}} }}}}
        {{#vardefine:Yw|{{#time:o|{{#var:DATE}}}}}}
        {{#vardefine:W|{{#time:W|{{#var:DATE}}}}}}
        {{#vardefine:N|{{#time:N|{{#var:DATE}}}}}}
        {{#vardefine:OFFSET|{{#if:{{{offset|}}}|{{{offset}}}|-28}}}}
        {{#vardefine:DOY|{{#expr:
          ( ({{#var:W}} - 1) * 7 + {{#var:N}} + {{#var:OFFSET}} - 1 ) mod 364 + 1
        }} }}
        {{#vardefine:MONTHIDX|{{#expr: floor( ({{#var:DOY}} - 1) / 28 ) + 1 }} }}
        {{#vardefine:DAYINMON|{{#expr: (({{#var:DOY}} - 1) mod 28) + 1 }} }}
        {{#vardefine:MONTH|
          {{#switch: {{#var:MONTHIDX}}
            |1=Capricorn|2=Aquarius|3=Pisces|4=Aries|5=Taurus|6=Gemini
            |7=Cancer|8=Leo|9=Virgo|10=Libra|11=Scorpio|12=Sagittarius|13=Ophiuchus
          }}
        }}
        {{#vardefine:YOFF|{{#if:{{{year_offset|}}}|{{{year_offset}}}|10000}}}}
        {{#vardefine:GY|{{#expr: {{#var:Yw}} + {{#var:YOFF}} }} }}
        <!-- Output pipe-separated parts -->
        {{#var:MONTH}}|{{#var:DAYINMON}}|{{#var:GY}}|{{#var:DOY}}|{{#var:MONTHIDX}}
   }}
 | short = {{GaiadDate|date={{{date|}}}|offset={{{offset|}}}|year_offset={{{year_offset|}}}|format=parts
            |{{#replace:{{GaiadDate|date={{{date|}}}|offset={{{offset|}}}|year_offset={{{year_offset|}}}|format=parts}}|*|*}} }}
   <!-- default long -->
 | #default =
   {{#invoke:String|split|str={{GaiadDate|date={{{date|}}}|offset={{{offset|}}}|year_offset={{{year_offset|}}}|format=parts}}|pattern=\|}}
   <!-- Above relies on Scribunto:String for pretty split; if not available, fall back: -->
   <!-- Fallback (no String module): repeat 'parts' and format manually -->
}}

<!-- Template:GaiadDate : 13×28 from ISO week-year; default offset aligns 2025-08-18 → Leo 8, 12025 -->

<!-- Choose input date (fallback = today) -->
<!-- We inline the date expression everywhere so no Variables extension is needed -->
<!-- Helper: {{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}} -->

<!-- Day-of-year on 52×7 grid, with an adjustable month OFFSET (default -28) -->
<!-- DOY = (((W-1)*7) + N + OFFSET - 1) mod 364 + 1 -->

{{#switch: {{{format|long}}}
 | parts =
   {{#expr:
     ( (
         ( {{#time:W|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}} - 1 ) * 7
         + {{#time:N|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}}
         + ( {{{offset|-28}}} )
         - 1 + 364*100
       ) mod 364 ) + 1
   }}<!-- DOY -->
   |{{#expr: floor( ( ( ( ( {{#time:W|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}} - 1 ) * 7
                               + {{#time:N|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}}
                               + ( {{{offset|-28}}} ) - 1 + 364*100 ) mod 364 ) ) / 28 ) + 1 }}<!-- MONTHIDX -->
   |{{#expr: ( ( ( ( {{#time:W|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}} - 1 ) * 7
                    + {{#time:N|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}}
                    + ( {{{offset|-28}}} ) - 1 + 364*100 ) mod 364 ) ) mod 28 + 1 }}<!-- DAYINMON -->
   |{{#expr: {{#time:o|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}} + ( {{{year_offset|10000}}} ) }}<!-- YEAR -->
   |{{#switch: {{#expr: floor( ( ( ( ( {{#time:W|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}} - 1 ) * 7
                                       + {{#time:N|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}}
                                       + ( {{{offset|-28}}} ) - 1 + 364*100 ) mod 364 ) ) / 28 ) + 1 }}
       |1=Capricorn|2=Aquarius|3=Pisces|4=Aries|5=Taurus|6=Gemini
       |7=Cancer|8=Leo|9=Virgo|10=Libra|11=Scorpio|12=Sagittarius|13=Ophiuchus
     }}
 | #default =
   {{#switch: {{#expr: floor( ( ( ( ( {{#time:W|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}} - 1 ) * 7
                                       + {{#time:N|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}}
                                       + ( {{{offset|-28}}} ) - 1 + 364*100 ) mod 364 ) ) / 28 ) + 1 }}
     |1=Capricorn|2=Aquarius|3=Pisces|4=Aries|5=Taurus|6=Gemini
     |7=Cancer|8=Leo|9=Virgo|10=Libra|11=Scorpio|12=Sagittarius|13=Ophiuchus
   }} <!-- Month name -->
   {{#expr: ( ( ( ( {{#time:W|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}} - 1 ) * 7
                   + {{#time:N|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}}
                   + ( {{{offset|-28}}} ) - 1 + 364*100 ) mod 364 ) ) mod 28 + 1 }}<!-- Day -->
   , {{#expr: {{#time:o|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}} + ( {{{year_offset|10000}}} ) }}<!-- Year -->
   (Day {{#expr:
     ( (
         ( {{#time:W|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}} - 1 ) * 7
         + {{#time:N|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}}
         + ( {{{offset|-28}}} )
         - 1 + 364*100
       ) mod 364 ) + 1
   }}, Month {{#expr: floor( ( ( ( ( {{#time:W|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}} - 1 ) * 7
                                       + {{#time:N|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}}
                                       + ( {{{offset|-28}}} ) - 1 + 364*100 ) mod 364 ) ) / 28 ) + 1 }})
}}

<!-- Template:GaiadDate — outputs [[Leo 8]], 12025 -->
<!-- Usage: {{GaiadDate}} or {{GaiadDate|date=2025-08-18}} -->
<!-- Optional: |offset=-28 (default), |year_offset=10000 -->

[[{{#switch: {{#expr: floor(
  ( ( ( {{#time:W|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}} - 1 ) * 7
      + {{#time:N|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}}
      + ( {{{offset|-28}}} ) - 1 + 364*100 ) mod 364 ) / 28 ) + 1 }}
  |1=Capricorn|2=Aquarius|3=Pisces|4=Aries|5=Taurus|6=Gemini
  |7=Cancer|8=Leo|9=Virgo|10=Libra|11=Scorpio|12=Sagittarius|13=Ophiuchus
}} {{#expr:
  ( ( ( {{#time:W|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}} - 1 ) * 7
      + {{#time:N|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}}
      + ( {{{offset|-28}}} ) - 1 + 364*100 ) mod 364 ) mod 28 + 1
}}]]
, {{#expr: {{#time:o|{{#if:{{{date|}}}|{{{date}}}|{{#time:Y-m-d}}}}}} + ( {{{year_offset|10000}}} ) }}

-- Module:GaiadDate — stable 13×28 converter using ISO week-year (o), week (W), weekday (N). -- Robust against nil/edge cases; no gsplit; correct month order (… Scorpio, Ophiuchus, Sagittarius).
local p = {}
local DEFAULT_MONTHS = { "Capricorn","Aquarius","Pisces","Aries","Taurus","Gemini","Cancer", "Leo","Virgo","Libra","Scorpio","Ophiuchus","Sagittarius" } local DEFAULT_WEEKDAYS = { "Sun","Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri","Sat" }
local function L() return mw.getContentLanguage() end
-- Simple CSV splitter (no gsplit dependency) local function splitCSV(s, want) if not s or s == "" then return nil end local t = {} s = s .. "," -- sentinel for part in s:gmatch("([^,]*),") do part = mw.text.trim(part) if part ~= "" then table.insert(t, part) end end if want and #t ~= want then return nil end return t end
local function toNum(x, default) local n = tonumber(x) if n == nil then return default end return n end
local function makeISOdate(y, m, d) if not y or not m or not d then return nil end return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", toNum(y, 0), toNum(m, 0), toNum(d, 0)) end
local function f(fmt, ts) -- Safe wrapper for formatDate; if ts is bad, fall back to "now" local ok, res = pcall(function() return L():formatDate(fmt, ts) end) if ok and res and res ~= "" then return res end return L():formatDate(fmt) -- fallback: current time end
local function modpos(a, m) return ((a % m) + m) % m end
local function compute(opts) local months = splitCSV(opts.monthsCSV, 13) or DEFAULT_MONTHS local weekdays = splitCSV(opts.weekdaysCSV, 7) or DEFAULT_WEEKDAYS
-- Build timestamp: explicit date string > y/m/d > now local ts = opts.date if (not ts or ts == "") and (opts.y and opts.m and opts.d) then ts = makeISOdate(opts.y, opts.m, opts.d) end
-- Pull fields from MediaWiki's calendar (robust) local Yg = toNum(f('Y', ts), 1970) -- Gregorian year local Yw = toNum(f('o', ts), Yg) -- ISO week-year local W = toNum(f('W', ts), 1) -- ISO week number (01–53) local N = toNum(f('N', ts), 1) -- ISO weekday (Mon=1..Sun=7)
local baseOffset = toNum(opts.offset, -28) -- default aligns 2025-08-18 → Leo 8 local yearOffset = toNum(opts.yearOffset, 10000)
-- Correct for ISO spillovers (early Jan / late Dec): -- early Jan: Yg=2000, Yw=1999 => +28 -- late Dec: Yg=1999, Yw=2000 => -28 local correctedOffset = baseOffset + 28 * (Yg - Yw)
-- Day-of-year in 13×28 grid (1..364) local doy = modpos(((W - 1) * 7 + N + correctedOffset - 1), 364) + 1
-- Map to month/day; all 1-based (no zero-index) local monthIdx = math.floor((doy - 1) / 28) + 1 local dayInMonth = ((doy - 1) % 28) + 1 local weekNo = math.floor((doy - 1) / 7) + 1 local weekdayIx = ((doy - 1) % 7) + 1
-- Clamp monthIdx just in case (defensive) if monthIdx < 1 then monthIdx = 1 end if monthIdx > 13 then monthIdx = 13 end
return { month = months[monthIdx] or ("Month " .. monthIdx), monthIdx = monthIdx, dayInMonth = dayInMonth, dayOfYear = doy, weekNo = weekNo, weekday = weekdays[weekdayIx] or "", gaiadYear = Yw + yearOffset } end
local function renderLong(r) return string.format('[[%s %d]], %d', r.month, r.dayInMonth, r.gaiadYear) end
function p.convert(frame) local args = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local r = compute{ date = args.date, y = args.y, m = args.m, d = args.d, monthsCSV = args.months, weekdaysCSV = args.weekdays, offset = args.offset, yearOffset = args.year_offset, } local fmt = (args.format or ""):lower() if fmt == "parts" then -- MONTH|DAY|YEAR|DOY|MONTHIDX return table.concat({ r.month, r.dayInMonth, r.gaiadYear, r.dayOfYear, r.monthIdx }, "|") end return renderLong(r) end
function p.today(frame) local args = frame:getParent() and frame:getParent().args or frame.args local r = compute{ monthsCSV = args.months, weekdaysCSV = args.weekdays, offset = args.offset, yearOffset = args.year_offset, } return renderLong(r) end
-- Sanity tests: {{#invoke:GaiadDate|selftest}} function p.selftest(frame) local out = {} local function T(label, ts, expect) local r = compute{ date = ts } table.insert(out, label .. " → " .. renderLong(r) .. " ; expected " .. expect) end T("2025-08-18", "2025-08-18", "[[Leo 8]], 12025") T("2000-01-01", "2000-01-01", "[[Ophiuchus 27]], 11999") return table.concat(out, "\n") end
return p

<!-- Template:GaiadDate — 13×28 from ISO week math; outputs [[Month Day]], 1YYYY -->
<!-- Inputs: date=YYYY-MM-DD  OR  y=YYYY|m=MM|d=DD -->
<!-- Month 1 = Sagittarius, then Capricorn … Ophiuchus (13) -->
[[{{#switch: {{#expr: floor( ( ( {{#time:W|
  {{#if:{{{date|}}}
    | {{{date}}}
    | {{#if:{{{y|}}}{{{m|}}}{{{d|}}}
        | {{#time:Y-m-d|{{{y}}}-{{{m}}}-{{{d}}}}}
        | {{#time:Y-m-d}}
      }}
  }}
}} - 1 ) / 4 ) ) + 1 }}
 |1=Sagittarius|2=Capricorn|3=Aquarius|4=Pisces|5=Aries|6=Taurus
 |7=Gemini|8=Cancer|9=Leo|10=Virgo|11=Libra|12=Scorpio|13=Ophiuchus
}}
 {{#expr:
   ( ( ( {{#time:W|
     {{#if:{{{date|}}}
       | {{{date}}}
       | {{#if:{{{y|}}}{{{m|}}}{{{d|}}}
           | {{#time:Y-m-d|{{{y}}}-{{{m}}}-{{{d}}}}}
           | {{#time:Y-m-d}}
         }}
     }}
   }} - 1 ) mod 4 ) * 7 )
   + {{#time:N|
       {{#if:{{{date|}}}
         | {{{date}}}
         | {{#if:{{{y|}}}{{{m|}}}{{{d|}}}
             | {{#time:Y-m-d|{{{y}}}-{{{m}}}-{{{d}}}}}
             | {{#time:Y-m-d}}
           }}
       }}
     }}
]]], {{#expr:
  {{#time:Y|
    {{#if:{{{date|}}}
      | {{{date}}}
      | {{#if:{{{y|}}}{{{m|}}}{{{d|}}}
          | {{#time:Y-m-d|{{{y}}}-{{{m}}}-{{{d}}}}}
          | {{#time:Y-m-d}}
        }}
    }}
  }} + 10000
}}

<!-- Template:GaiadDate -->
{{#invoke:GaiadDate|convert
 | date   = {{{date|}}}
 | y      = {{{y|}}}
 | m      = {{{m|}}}
 | d      = {{{d|}}}
 | format = {{{format|}}}  <!-- use format=parts to see W,N,ISO year -->
}}

<!-- Template:GaiadDate -->
{{#invoke:GaiadDate|convert
 | date   = {{{date|}}}
 | y      = {{{y|}}}
 | m      = {{{m|}}}
 | d      = {{{d|}}}
 | format = {{{format|}}}  <!-- use format=parts to see W,N,ISO year -->
}}

<!-- Template:GaiadDate -->
{{#invoke:GaiadDate|convert
 | date   = {{{date|}}}
 | y      = {{{y|}}}
 | m      = {{{m|}}}
 | d      = {{{d|}}}
 | format = {{{format|}}}  <!-- use format=parts to see W,N,ISO year -->
}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<!-- Template:GaiadDate -->
{{#invoke:GaiadDate|convert
 | date   = {{{date|}}}
 | y      = {{{y|}}}
 | m      = {{{m|}}}
 | d      = {{{d|}}}
 | format = {{{format|}}}  <!-- use format=parts to see W,N,ISO year -->
}}
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

 | d      = {{{d|}}}

}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=GaiadDate here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=GaiadDate for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->

{{#invoke:GaiadDate|convert
 | date   = {{{date|}}}
 | y      = {{{y|}}}
 | m      = {{{m|}}}
 | d      = {{{d|}}}
 | format = {{{format|}}}  <!-- use format=parts to see W,N,ISO year -->
}}

{{#invoke:GaiadDate|convert
 | date   = {{{date|}}}
 | y      = {{{y|}}}
 | m      = {{{m|}}}
 | d      = {{{d|}}}
 | format = {{{format|}}}  
}}
<noinclude>[[Category:git synced pages]]</noinclude>
